title: Kingsammelot's Music Discs

body:

- TEXTURE PACK CREATED BY THATONEGOOBER

--Music Discs in which are changed..--

Disc 13 - Jazzy Juice

Blocks - Muga Million
 

For the famous and goated streamer, KINGSAMMELOT

 

Hey Samme,

If you see this then HELLO! I'm a big fan and I've been watching for a while, I've been there for 2 of the mugathons/streamathons and I'm so happy that you get to see this. I'm not gonna self promo myself but the social links are links to your music videos (which are goated). I have to rate your music 55/55.
